Calculate risk score (CVSS × business impact × exploitability)
quality_gates: All vulnerabilities enriched with CVE data

items.name: XSS Prevention Techniques
items.purpose: Prevent Cross-Site Scripting vulnerabilities through proper output encoding, input validation, and Content Security Policy.
items.summary: XSS prevention review covering reflected, stored, and DOM-based XSS with encoding strategies and CSP implementation.
failure_modes: Incomplete output encoding for all contexts
verification: All output contexts properly encoded (HTML, JS, URL, CSS)
CSP header configured with restrictive policy
Input validation on all user-supplied data
No XSS vulnerabilities found in testing
rollback: Revert CSP policy if it breaks legitimate functionality

items.name: Zero Trust Architecture Review
items.purpose: Review and implement zero trust security principles across network, identity, and access management.
items.summary: Zero trust architecture review covering identity verification, least privilege, microsegmentation, and continuous validation.
verification: All access decisions based on identity, not network location
Least privilege enforced for all users and services
Continuous verification of device and user posture
rollback: Revert to previous access policies if zero trust changes disrupt operations
